executives.name: James D. Taiclet
executives.background: Mr. Taiclet has served as Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer of Lockheed Martin since June 2020. He previously served as Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer of American Tower Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Jesus Malave
executives.background: Mr. Malave has served as Chief Financial Officer since February 2022. He previously served as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of L3Harris Technologies, Inc.

executives.name: Frank A. St. John
executives.background: Mr. St. John has served as Chief Operating Officer since June 2020. He has held various leadership roles at Lockheed Martin for over 30 years.

executives.name: Evan Scott
executives.background: Mr. Scott has served as Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary since 2023.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary

board_of_directors.name: James D. Taiclet
board_of_directors.background: Chairman, President and CEO of Lockheed Martin.

board_of_directors.name: Daniel F. Akerson
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman and CEO of General Motors Company.

board_of_directors.name: David B. Burritt
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of United States Steel Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Bruce A. Carlson
board_of_directors.background: Retired General, U.S. Air Force and former Director of the National Reconnaissance Office.

board_of_directors.name: Joseph F. Dunford, Jr.
board_of_directors.background: Retired General, U.S. Marine Corps and former Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff.

board_of_directors.name: Ilene S. Gordon
board_of_directors.background: Retired Chairman, President and CEO of Ingredion Incorporated.

board_of_directors.name: Vicki A. Hollub
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of Occidental Petroleum Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Jeh C. Johnson
board_of_directors.background: Partner at Paul, Weiss, Rifkind, Wharton & Garrison LLP and former U.S. Secretary of Homeland Security.

board_of_directors.name: John M. Richardson
board_of_directors.background: Retired Admiral, U.S. Navy and former Chief of Naval Operations.

board_of_directors.name: Patricia E. Yarrington
board_of_directors.background: Retired Vice President and CFO of Chevron Corporation.
